funFacts: Manta Moray Eel peeking from Caves have the largest brain-to-body mass ratio of all cold-blooded fish, displaying high curiosity and intelligence.
Unlike stingMoray Eel peeking from Caves, manta Moray Eel peeking from Caves are completely harmless, lacking venomous tail stingers and feeding entirely on plankton.
